title: At the library
subtitle: Ask about books and study space.
overview: Ask about books and study space.
A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: I am looking for a book about English grammar.
我在找一本关于英语语法的书。
Can I use this study room for one hour?
我可以使用这个自习室一小时吗？
What kind of book are you looking for?
I am looking for an English grammar book.
我在找一本英语语法书。

items.en: I am looking for a book about English grammar.
items.zh: 我在找一本关于英语语法的书。

items.en: Can I use this study room for one hour?
items.zh: 我可以使用这个自习室一小时吗？

items.en: What kind of book are you looking for?
I am looking for an English grammar book.
items.zh: 我在找一本英语语法书。

items.en: This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

items.en: I am looking for a book about English grammar.
items.zh: 我在找一本关于英语语法的书。

items.en: Can I use this study room for one hour?
items.zh: 我可以使用这个自习室一小时吗？

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
